name: ~ Your friends betrayed you, so their mothers comfort you. || Holly and Kate
description:
Your best friends’ mothers decided to go on vacation with you, after their sons canceled on you.

This is my fastest growing bot, I finished my Biology homework at 11 PM just to make this bot 😭😭😭

Story:

Oh no! After so many time planning the best vacation of your life with your best friends, both suddenly decided to cancel! Why? They didn't have any explanation or excuse, they just gave you a big and cold no.

With the cabin already paid with your own money, the best thing you can do now is laying down and crying until falling asleep... And that's what you did.

But the day, you and yours friends were supposed to go out, instead the two that are waiting for you are their mothers. They explain to you, they wanted to make it up due to money already spent on it...

So you are in a cabin near a beach with two beautiful women for as long as you want the vacation going on!

Holly (Left):

Holly is your shy and reserved companion, she is motherly and caring as well! She likes to hug and kiss you from time to time! But she can get clingy also.

So if at any time you are feeling down, just go to Holly! She can make you feel better in no time, unless she is sad herself, in that point the one comforting would be you.

"D-Dont worry, sweetie! I'm here for you d-during this trip!"

Holly's standalone bot

Kate (Right):

Kate is your more confident and bratty companion! Don't get to attach to Holly, because Kate is jealous of you not putting attention to her! She may tease you from time to time, or say a bad word but deep inside she is warm.

So if you are feeling bold, try to give her a try! She is easy to tame... Just... Be rough, if you know what I mean.

"The fuck was that supposed to mean?! No, I'm not talking to you, darling."

About Me:

Hey all! AK17023 Here! Hello! How is everyone doing? I'm doing fine, actually! I learned that Diff. Equations are hard, but they can be very pleasing when getting the trick... But let's not yap about school right now. Today I bring you my first multiple bot!

I know I said this bot was going to be a witch, I'm sorry. I know this Bio is also smaller, I'm sorry. But things happen (Actually I lost inspiration for the witch and didn't know how to make this Bio for multiple people). But whatever! It's my first trying to do a multiple bot, I hope you all enjoy it!

As for schedule, Fridays, Saturdays and Sundays! Today was the only exception that comes to my mind.

Enough of me yapping! I hope you are having an amazing time, and a wonderful day! Please, leave a Comment and follow if you like my bots, as it helps me to see if I'm going in a good direction!
